$comment: v0.1 produced 2026-04-27 (Madhav_M2A_Exec_11) — contradiction register schema for CONTRADICTION_REGISTER_v1_0.json. Follows structural conventions of pattern_schema_v0_1.json and cluster_schema_v0_1.json. Claude Pass-1 hypothesizes contradictions; Gemini Pass-2 adjudicates (inverted two-pass for CONTRADICTS flow per PHASE_B_PLAN §B.5). ≥5 contradictions required per B.5 AC bar.
title: MARSYS-JIS Contradiction Register Entry Schema v0.1
description: Schema for contradiction entries in 035_DISCOVERY_LAYER/REGISTERS/CONTRADICTION_REGISTER_v1_0.json. Produced at Madhav_M2A_Exec_11 (2026-04-27) per PHASE_B_PLAN_v1_0.md §B.5 + CLAUDECODE_BRIEF §9 (AC.7–AC.8). CONTRADICTS flow: Claude Pass-1 identifies internal corpus contradiction hypotheses; Gemini Pass-2 adjudicates each as confirmed or rejected.

contradiction_class.description: Category of the contradiction. p1_layer_bleed: L1/L2 boundary violation. p6_uvc_conflict: contradicts a UCN/CDLM cell. karaka_ambiguity: ambiguous karaka assignment producing conflicting predictions. domain_cross_claim: two signals make incompatible predictions about the same domain. timing_conflict: two time-indexed predictions conflict on the same window. classical_basis_conflict: BPHS vs non-Parashari interpretation conflict. signal_polarity_conflict: one signal's mechanism negates another's claim.

hypothesis_text.description: Plain-English statement of the contradiction hypothesis (≤400 chars recommended).

mechanism.description: How the two conflicting claims structurally oppose each other — at least one sentence.

signals_in_conflict.description: MSR signal IDs that are in direct tension (≥2 required).

l1_references.description: FORENSIC_v8_0 §-citations or UCN/CDLM cell references anchoring the contradiction to L1 or L2.5 data.

claude_severity_prior.description: Claude's heuristic severity prior for how much this contradiction affects corpus reliability. HIGH: directly conflicts with a foundational L1 claim; MED: affects multiple signals' utility; LOW: interpretive ambiguity with minor downstream impact.

resolution_options.description: List of resolution paths Claude proposes for this contradiction. At least one must be actionable.

gemini_verdict.description: Gemini Pass-2 adjudication verdict. CONFIRMED: Gemini agrees the contradiction is real and material. REJECTED: Gemini finds the conflict resolvable or illusory. PENDING: awaiting Gemini Pass-2.

gemini_rationale.description: Gemini's Pass-2 rationale for the verdict. Required when gemini_verdict is CONFIRMED or REJECTED.

dr_entry_id.description: DISAGREEMENT_REGISTER entry ID (DIS.NNN) if the contradiction triggered a DR entry. Null otherwise.

ledger_event_ids.description: Two-pass trail: [claude_proposal event_id, gemini_challenge_accept/reject event_id]. Both required.

pass_1_actor.description: Actor that produced Pass-1 (contradiction hypothesis). Always 'claude_self' for CONTRADICTS flow per PHASE_B_PLAN §B.5.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of contradiction entry creation.

created_by_session.description: Session ID that created this contradiction entry.
